primitives.description: encircling; going in a circle; recurring cycle — the spatial idea of rotation, orbit, and return
primitives.plain_description: encircling; going in a circle; again
primitives.primitive_test_note: Maximally generative: spin=move+around, again=do+around, surround=outside+around, orbit=move+far+around, cycle=time+around, return=move+around+here, wrap=hold+around. No existing primitives combine to express circular/cyclical spatial relation.
primitives.campfire_reason: Ring 2: everyday fluency beyond the campfire core.

primitives.description: the rear side; behind; the direction away from the front
primitives.primitive_test_note: Spatial orientation primitive — the complement of front. Gives: behind=back+place, backward=move+back, avoid=go+back+from. Also covers the sense of returning (going back to where you were).

description: Converged Fonoran concept inventory: ring-redesigned primitive set with 4 new spatial primitives (around/front/back/through) and 16 demoted to compound_candidate. Derivable concepts live in data/fonoran-compounds.json; polarity/tense/mood are particles, not roots.
experience_note: Primitives capped at 150 across three rings. See data/fonoran-root-rings.json.
